CustomField.formula: Clear_Project_Sponsor_Buy_in_Score__c + Goals_of_Project_clearly_defined_Score__c + Sales_Lifecycle_being_rushed_Score__c + Is_there_a_client_PM_Score__c + Knowledgeable_client_product_owner_Score__c + Internal_resource_to_own_delivery_Score__c + Have_they_completed_IT_projects_Score__c + Detailed_requirements_written_down_Score__c + Expectations_beyond_budget_Score__c
CustomField.label: Risk Total
